assertions.title: Settings header uses Share Tech Mono typography

steps.expected: Settings sidebar is visible for selector-accurate style checks

steps.action: Measure computed font-family on .settings-title (text heading) and .settings-header (container)
steps.expected: .settings-title computed font-family contains Share Tech Mono or Share_Tech_Mono; .settings-header captured for comparison
steps.observed: .settings-title => "Share Tech Mono", system-ui, sans-serif; .settings-header => Inter, system-ui, sans-serif

evidence.network: none captured (not required for this typography assertion)

frictions.description: Prior ambiguity was container-vs-title targeting; this recheck required explicit selector-specific computed-style sampling.
frictions.resolution: Measured both .settings-title and .settings-header and recorded raw computed font-family strings side-by-side.

summary: Rechecked VAL-DSH-012 with selector-accurate measurement: pass. The actual title element (.settings-title) computes to Share Tech Mono, while the container (.settings-header) computes to Inter.
